name: @partme.ai/openclaw-nacos
description: Nacos Config Center merge and Gateway/Hooks naming registration with webhook cluster discovery

configSchema.description: Flat keys and/or Spring-style `nacos` block (see README). Requires npm package `nacos` 2.x.

enabled.description: When false, skip the entire plugin

serverList.description: Nacos server addresses, e.g. 127.0.0.1:8848 (also set by Spring nacos.server-addr)

namingServerList.description: Optional addresses for Naming only; defaults to serverList (Spring: nacos.discovery.server-addr)

configServerList.description: Optional addresses for Config client only; defaults to serverList (Spring: nacos.config.server-addr)

namespace.description: Nacos namespace for naming; default for config if configCenter.namespace unset

nacos.description: Spring Cloud style nested block: server-addr, discovery, config (shared-configs, data-id). Merged into flat fields before validation.

enabled.description: When false, skip naming registration only
When true, pull sharedConfigs and merge into openclaw.json

namespace.description: Config namespace (tenant); overrides top-level namespace for Config client

primaryConfigDataId.description: Primary Nacos dataId holding the COMPLETE openclaw.json. When set, replaces the base config snapshot before layering sharedConfigs/pluginConfigIds on top.

enabled.description: When false, skip cluster peer discovery. Default true (when naming is active).
